---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/my_image.jpg"
  #links:
  #  - icon: twitter
  #   text: Twitter
  #    href: https://x.com/olayusuff14
  #  - icon: github
  #   text: Github
  #   href: https://github.com/olanrewajuyusuffecon
  #  - icon: linkedin
  #    text: LinkedIn
  #    href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/olanrewaju-yusuff-58417a19b/
  #  - icon: envelope
  #    text: Email
  #    href: "mailto:oyusuff4@student.gsu.edu"  
---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# Welcome to my website!

**[Curriculum Vitae](cv/cv.pdf) | [Job Market Paper](research/ola_yusuff_jmp.pdf) | [Research](research/index.qmd) | [Teaching](teaching/index.qmd)**

<div style="margin-top: 10px; text-align: justify;">

Welcome! I am a Ph.D. candidate in the Department of Economics at Georgia State 
University, advised by Professors [James Marton](https://aysps.gsu.edu/profile/james-marton/), 
[Lauren Hoehn-Velasco](https://www.laurenhoehnvelasco.com/), 
[Keith Teltser](https://sites.google.com/site/kteltser), and 
[Ann DiGirolamo](https://ghpc.gsu.edu/profile/ann-digirolamo-2/). I am on the 
2025-2026 job market.

I am an applied microeconomist with research interests in Health, Public, Labor, 
and Development Economics. My research examines how access to healthcare 
infrastructure affects population health, with a focus on access to mental health 
treatment facilities (JMP), emergency medical services, and maternal healthcare. 
I combine cutting-edge causal inference methods with novel data from the United 
States and Nigeria to provide the first causal evidence on these critical policy 
questions.

I am also a research assistant at the [Center on Health and Homelessness](https://chh.gsu.edu/) in the [School of Public Health](https://publichealth.gsu.edu/) at [Georgia State University](https://www.gsu.edu/), working on the **Program and Process Evaluation's Evidence Gap Map Project** for Professor [Shannon Self-Brown](https://publichealth.gsu.edu/profile/shannon-self-brown/). Previously, I was a Research Assistant at the [Centre for Econometric and Allied Research (CEAR)](https://www.linkedin.com/company/centre-for-econometrics-and-applied-research/posts/?feedView=all) at the University of Ibadan, where I developed expertise in development economics and healthcare systems in Sub-Saharan Africa. Here is my [CV](cv/cv.pdf), and you can reach out to me at [oyusuff4@student.gsu.edu](mailto:oyusuff4@student.gsu.edu).

</div>

**Recent Highlights:**

- Selected to present at the [NBER Conference on Health and Healthcare Variations across the Population](https://www.nber.org/conferences/health-and-healthcare-variations-across-population-spring-2026) (Cambridge, MA), [ASHEcon Annual Conference](https://ashecon.confex.com/ashecon/2026/meetingapp.cgi/Search/0?sort=Relevance&size=10&page=1&searchterm=olanrewaju%20yusuff) (Minneapolis, MN), and [AcademyHealth Annual Research Meeting](https://academyhealth.confex.com/academyhealth/2026arm/meetingapp.cgi/Person/154498) (Seattle, WA) - Spring/Summer 2026

- **Revise and Resubmit** at the ***American Journal of Health Economics (AJHE)*** for ["Public Payment Mandates and Provider Supply"](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5260167) with [Lauren Hoehn-Velasco](https://www.laurenhoehnvelasco.com/) and [Yu-Ting Huang](https://reinayutinghuang.com/)

- **Revise and Resubmit** at the ***Journal of African Economies*** for ["Can Higher Education Stimulate Local Economic Development? The Labor Market Impacts of Federal University Expansion in Nigeria"](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5575331) with [Godwin Aipoh](https://www.godwinaipoh.com/home)

- Recipient of the [Center for the Economic Analysis of Risk (CEAR): Dissertation Fellowship & CEAR Scholar](https://cear.gsu.edu/profile/olanrewaju-yusuff/): [Robinson College of Business, GSU](https://cear.gsu.edu/) (2025-2026)

- Selected for the [Institute for Research on Poverty (IRP) Professional Development Training](https://www.irp.wisc.edu/staff/yusuff-olanrewaju/), [University of Wisconsin-Madison](https://www.irp.wisc.edu/training/professional-development-training-series-on-poverty-and-economic-mobility-research/) (2025-2026)

- Recipient of [Association for Public Policy & Management Equity & Inclusion Fellowship](https://www.appam.org/about-appam/awards/2025-equity-inclusion-fellowship-student-recipients/) (2025) | [Featured in GSU News](https://news.gsu.edu/2025/12/09/georgia-state-economics-students-honored-nationally-for-policy-research/)

- Recipient of the [Association for Mentoring & Inclusion in Economics Fellowship](https://econmentoring.org/mentees/yusuff-olanrewaju/) 
  (2025), mentored by Professors [Ellen McCullough](http://www.ellenmccullough.com/) 
  (University of Georgia) and [Leah Lakdawala](https://leahlakdawala.weebly.com/) 
  (Wake Forest University)


- Listed on the [AEA CSMGEP Minority Job Market Candidates 2025-26](https://www.aeaweb.org/about-aea/committees/csmgep/market)

<!--- Presented at the American Society of Health Economists Annual Meeting (2024, 2025) and APPAM Fall Research Conference (2024, 2025)
- Panel Organizer, American Society of Health Economists Conference, San Diego (2024)

[CV](/cv/index.qmd) <!-- | [Job Market Paper](#) | [Teaching Materials](#) -->
